SEARCH
Package org.key_project.prover.rules

Interface TacletMatcher

All Known Implementing Classes:
VMTacletMatcher
public interface TacletMatcher
Defines the interface for matching terms against the pattern (find) part of a taclet, handling schema variable instantiations and checking variable conditions.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    checkConditions(@Nullable MatchResultInfo matchResultInfo, @NonNull LogicServices services)
    Checks the given match result against the taclet's variable conditions.
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    checkVariableConditions(@Nullable SchemaVariable var, @Nullable SyntaxElement instantiationCandidate, @Nullable MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
    Checks whether a schema variable can be instantiated with the given candidate term, under the provided match conditions.
    @NonNull AssumesMatchResult
    matchAssumes(@NonNull Iterable<@NonNull AssumesFormulaInstantiation> toMatch, @NonNull Term template, @NonNull MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
    Matches a template formula (typically from the "assumes" part of a taclet) against a list of constraint formulas (e.g., from a sequent's antecedent or succedent), using the given initial match conditions.
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    matchAssumes(@NonNull Iterable<AssumesFormulaInstantiation> toMatch, @NonNull MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
    Matches a list of formula instantiations against the full "assumes" sequent of a taclet, starting with the given initial match conditions.
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    matchFind(@NonNull Term term, @NonNull MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
    Attempts to match the given term against the taclet's "find" term.
    @Nullable MatchResultInfo
    matchSV(SchemaVariable sv, SyntaxElement se, MatchResultInfo matchCond, LogicServices services)
    Matches a schema variable to a syntax element under the given match conditions.

  • Method Details

    • matchFind

      @Nullable MatchResultInfo matchFind(@NonNull Term term, @NonNull MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
      Attempts to match the given term against the taclet's "find" term.

      If the taclet has no "find" term, or if matching fails, this method returns null.

      Parameters:
      term - the Term to be matched against the taclet's "find" expression
      matchCond - the current MatchResultInfo including partial instantiations
      services - the LogicServices providing contextual information
      Returns:
      the updated match result (possibly with added schema variable instantiations) on success, or null if no match is found

    • checkVariableConditions

      @Nullable MatchResultInfo checkVariableConditions(@Nullable SchemaVariable var, @Nullable SyntaxElement instantiationCandidate, @Nullable MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
      Checks whether a schema variable can be instantiated with the given candidate term, under the provided match conditions.
      Parameters:
      var - the SchemaVariable to instantiate
      instantiationCandidate - the candidate instantiation for var
      matchCond - the current MatchResultInfo representing the current match status
      services - the LogicServices providing contextual information
      Returns:
      the updated match result if instantiation is valid, or null otherwise

    • checkConditions

      @Nullable MatchResultInfo checkConditions(@Nullable MatchResultInfo matchResultInfo, @NonNull LogicServices services)
      Checks the given match result against the taclet's variable conditions.

      Returns an updated match result if all conditions are satisfied. If not, or if matchResultInfo is null, the method returns null.

      Parameters:
      matchResultInfo - the match result to validate
      services - the LogicServices providing contextual information
      Returns:
      the validated and potentially updated match result, or null if validation fails

    • matchAssumes

      @NonNull AssumesMatchResult matchAssumes(@NonNull Iterable<@NonNull AssumesFormulaInstantiation> toMatch, @NonNull Term template, @NonNull MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
      Matches a template formula (typically from the "assumes" part of a taclet) against a list of constraint formulas (e.g., from a sequent's antecedent or succedent), using the given initial match conditions.
      Parameters:
      toMatch - a list of formulas to attempt matching with template
      template - the formula template to match against each formula in toMatch
      matchCond - the current MatchResultInfo representing the current match status
      services - the LogicServices providing contextual information
      Returns:
      a result containing the successfully matched formulas and their associated match conditions

    • matchAssumes

      @Nullable MatchResultInfo matchAssumes(@NonNull Iterable<AssumesFormulaInstantiation> toMatch, @NonNull MatchResultInfo matchCond, @NonNull LogicServices services)
      Matches a list of formula instantiations against the full "assumes" sequent of a taclet, starting with the given initial match conditions.

      Precondition: toMatch.size() == ifSequent().size()

      Parameters:
      toMatch - a list of formulas to attempt matching with template
      matchCond - the current MatchResultInfo representing the current match status
      services - the LogicServices providing contextual information
      Returns:
      the resulting match conditions if successful; null otherwise

    • matchSV

      @Nullable MatchResultInfo matchSV(SchemaVariable sv, SyntaxElement se, MatchResultInfo matchCond, LogicServices services)
      Matches a schema variable to a syntax element under the given match conditions.
      Parameters:
      sv - the SchemaVariable to match
      se - the candidate SyntaxElement
      matchCond - the current MatchResultInfo representing the current match status
      services - the LogicServices providing contextual information
      Returns:
      updated match result if successful; null if no match was possible
